reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
진도믹스 9갤 강쥐를 키우는 테리맘입니다•.•
평소 저희 강쥐는 은근 입맛이 까다로와서 먹어보지 않았던 간식은 잘 먹지도 않고 관심이 없습니다 ㅠ.ㅠ
근데 신기하게도 부스팅코인칩은 주자마자 거부 반응 없이 
챱챱 소리 내며 엄청 잘 먹었어요!
엄마 마음 완죠니 뿌듯+.+
코인칩 비프 성분은 멸치, 병아리콩 외에도 소화 도움되는 
성분도 같이 들어있다고 해요! 
저희 강쥐는 한참 뛰어놀 시기라 슬개골에 혹시 문제가 생길까 조마조마한데 뼈 건강이랑 성장 발육에도 좋다고 하니 평소에도 꾸준히 급여해보려구요!
무엇보다 방부제랑 첨가물 없다는 문구가 안심이 되었어요!
코인칩 향은 제가 느끼기에도 맛있을 것 같은 육포+오징어 스멜이 납니다 ㅎㅎ 역시 바잇미는 사랑입니다•.•
reviews.content_en: I'm Terry Mom, raising a 9-year-old Jindo mix named Gangju •.• Usually, our Gangju is pretty picky about food, so he doesn't eat treats he hasn't tried before and shows no interest ㅠ.ㅠ But surprisingly, as soon as I gave him BITE ME Coin Chips, he had zero hesitation and ate them SO well with smacking sounds! Mom's heart is so full and proud +.+ I heard that BITE ME Coin Chips Beef contain anchovies and chickpeas, plus ingredients that help with digestion! Our Gangju is at that age where he plays a lot, so I was worried about his patella, but since they're good for bone health and growth development, I'm planning to give them to him regularly! Most importantly, the fact that there are no preservatives or additives is so reassuring! To me, the Coin Chips smell like delicious beef jerky + squid 😄 BITE ME is truly love •.•

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
이 세상 바삭거림이 아닙니다...
영양가👍🏻 기호성👍🏻 바삭바삭 식감👍🏻
요즘 저희 강아지 원픽 간식으로 등극했어요!!!
reviews.content_en: This crunchiness is out of this world... Nutrition👍🏻 Palatability👍🏻 Crispy texture👍🏻 It's become our pup's number one snack these days!!!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
칩형태라서 굿굿
다견가정에서 하나로 나눠주기도 좋아요
바삭한 육포하드와소프트의 경계ㅎㅎ
기호성 갑 최고!
reviews.content_en: Love the chip shape! Great for sharing among multiple dogs too. The boundary between crispy jerky hard and soft 😄 Best palatability ever!

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: 잘 먹어서 벌써 세네번 주문한 거 같아요
reviews.content_en: She's already eaten it so well that I think I've ordered it like 3-4 times

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 입이 진짜 엄청 짧은 앤데 까서 주자마자 잘먹길래 놀랐어요 바작바작 먹는 소리가 듣기 좋아서 제가 계속 주고싶을정도였어욯ㅎㅎ거진 asmr급ㅎㅎ 기호성도 좋고 첨가제,방부제 안들어있어서 성분 깔끔하고! 최고최고!!
reviews.content_en: My pup has a really short mouth but was so surprised how well she ate it right away! The crunchy munching sounds are so satisfying that I kept wanting to give her more 😄 Almost ASMR level 😄 Great palatability and no additives or preservatives, so the ingredients are clean! The best!!

reviews.name: 나****
reviews.content: 코인칩노란봉투만 들어도 신나서 부르지않아도 옵니다..ㅎㅎ입맛이 까다로워서 실패한 간식들이 많거든요.인친님피드보고 구매했는데 우리배추입맛에 맞는 코인칩발견해서 제가 더 신나요!
reviews.content_en: Just hearing the sound of the yellow Coin Chips bag makes her excited and she comes without even being called 😄 We've had many failed treats because she's picky, so I bought this after seeing a friend's post, and finding Coin Chips that matches our Baechu's taste made me even more excited!

reviews.name: 전****
reviews.content: 코인칩 넘 귀여워요! 사람 과자같아요.ㅎㅎ 잘먹더라구요. 입짧은 친정멍이꺼!
reviews.content_en: Coin Chips are so cute! They look like human snacks 😄 She eats them well. Perfect for our short-mouthed visiting doggy!

reviews.name: D****
reviews.content: 이거 진짜 애들이 엄청 좋아해요. 생긴것도 사람도 먹고싶게 생겨서 포장도 이쁘고 사람 과자같아요. 또 시키려구요.
reviews.content_en: The kids really love these! They look so appetizing that even humans would want to eat them - the packaging is pretty and they look just like human snacks. Definitely ordering again.

reviews.name: 송****
reviews.content: 기호성 너무 좋아요 ㅎㅎ 치킨, 연어 등등 시리즈도 나왔으면 좋겠네요!
reviews.content_en: The palatability is amazing 😄 I wish they'd come out with other flavors like chicken and salmon!

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 역시 소고기.. 기호성 최고 ㅎㅎㅎ 넘 잘먹어요 ㅋㅋ 생각보다 크기가 좀 있어요! 삼키로 말티쥬는 하루에 한 개만 주려구용 💚
reviews.content_en: Beef is always the best.. Best palatability 😄😄 She eats them so well 😄 They're bigger than I expected! I'm planning to give our Maltese Juju just one per day 💚

reviews.name: a****
reviews.content: 오독오독 잘 씹어먹어요. 냄새 맡곤 냉큼 물어가네요.ㅋㅋ신상 언제 사보나 했는데 할인할 때 좋은 기회에 구매해봤어요. 만족합니다.
reviews.content_en: He crunches on it really well. He smells it and grabs it right away lol. I was wondering when the new product would go on sale, and I got a good opportunity to buy it during a discount. Really satisfied!

reviews.name: n****
reviews.content: 시바견 세이디 인스타보고 구매했어요 :-) 입맛이 까다로워서 실패하는 간식이 많은 편인데 우리배추가 맛있는지 진짜 잘먹네요! 총알배송도 감사해요 :D
reviews.content_en: I bought it after seeing it on Instagram from a Shiba Inu named Saeidi :-)  My pup is picky with treats and often rejects them, but our Baechu really loves this one and eats it so well! Thank you for the super fast shipping too :D

reviews.name: 안****
reviews.content:
정말 잘먹어요 
가로세로 금이 가져있어서 부숴서 주기도 좋네요
계속 구비할것같아욥!
reviews.content_en:
My dog really loves it!
It has cracks running across it, so it's great for breaking it into pieces to give.
I think I'll keep restocking this!

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
소고기냄새가 아주 찐하게 나네용
아이들이 넘 좋아합니당ㅎ
reviews.content_en:
The beef smell is really strong!
The kids love it so much ㅎ

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content:
처음 먹는간식이라 낯설어 해서 우선 부셔서 줬는데 잘게 바스러 져서 잘먹어요! 
멸치맛이어서 그런지 먹고나서 기분좋은지 헥헥 거리는데 입냄새가 나네요 ㅎㅎ 그마저도 귀여운 강아지들이지만 ㅎㅎ
기름지지않고 건강한 간식이라 마음이 안심되네오
reviews.content_en:
Since it was a new treat for him, he was hesitant at first so I broke it up for him, and it crumbles nicely so he eats it well!
Since it has an anchovy flavor, he seems happy after eating it - he's panting away, though his breath smells a bit lol But that's just part of how cute my dogs are ㅎㅎ
Since it's not greasy and is a healthy treat, I feel so reassured!

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: 지난번에 수제간식 사면서 같이 구매해서 줘보니 너무 잘 먹고 바삭해서 잘게 잘라 주기좋고 특별한 첨가물없이 원물 그대로라 좋아서 구매하고 또 재구매했어요 ㅎㅎ 이번에는 포크사면서 오리도 같이 샀어용 세일할때 사서 넘 좋은 가격으로 샀어요 아이가 먹고 알러지나 별 트러블이 없어서 넘 좋네요 항상 좋은상품 부탁드려요🫶🏻
reviews.content_en: I bought it together with homemade treats last time, and he ate it so well! It's crispy and easy to cut into small pieces, and I like that it's the raw ingredient without any special additives. I've repurchased it since! This time I bought duck along with pork lol I got an amazing price during the sale! My pup had no allergies or any issues after eating, so I'm really happy. Please keep offering great products always 🫶🏻

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
사진만 봐도 맛있어 보여서 바로 구매했어요
다만.. 포장지가 약간 불량인지 가위로 지퍼백 바로 위까지 자르니까 뜯기더라구요!,, 손으로는 절대 못 뜯는..ㅎㅎ
양도 생각보다 적어서 아쉬웠어요
맛있는 냄새나고 맛있게 먹어서 재구매는 할거에요.....
고양이도 맛있대요
reviews.content_en:
It looked delicious just from the photo so I bought it right away.
But.. the packaging was a bit defective - when I cut right up to the zipper with scissors, it tore ㅎㅎ I couldn't tear it open by hand at all..
I was a bit disappointed that the quantity was less than expected.
But it smells delicious and he eats it well, so I'll repurchase...
Even the cat says it's delicious!

reviews.name: 리****
reviews.content:
입 짧고, 간식조차 자기 스타일이 아니면 절대 안먹는 새침데기 진도 여자아이입니다! 
새로운 간식 탐색하진 않고 원래 먹던 것만 먹는 스타일인데 거부감없이 잘 먹더라구요! 그리고 완전 육식파라 고기 냄새, 고기 함유량에도 깐깐해서 얄쨜없는데 !! 잘 먹어서 기분 좋네요!! 

손으로도 잘 잘리고 바삭바삭하니 맛있게 먹어요! 코인칩으로 단백질 흡수랑 장건강 둘다 챙겨서 기분 좋은 간식인 것 같아요. 사이즈도 적절해서 에너지 넘치는 15kg 아이에게 산책하고 돌아와서 간편하게 급여하고 있어요 ^^~
reviews.content_en:
She's a picky Jindo girl with a short appetite - even for treats, she absolutely won't eat if it's not her style!
She usually doesn't explore new treats and only eats what she's used to, but she ate this without any hesitation! And since she's a complete carnivore and very particular about the meat smell and meat content, this was quite surprising!! I'm so happy she's eating it well!!

It's easy to break by hand and crispy, so she enjoys eating it! With the coin chips, I feel good knowing we're taking care of both protein absorption and gut health. The size is just right, so I easily give it to my energetic 15kg pup after walks :D~

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 바삭바삭.. 강쥐가 너무너무 좋아해요~ 휴대하기도 좋구..! 선물받았는데 잘 먹어서 직접 구매했어요❤️ 입짧은 아인데 기호도가 좋네요 강쥐가 행복하대요ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: Crispy crispy.. my pup loves it so much~ It's easy to carry too..! I received it as a gift and he ate it so well that I bought it myself ❤️ Even though he's picky, he really likes this one! My pup says he's happy ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: o****
reviews.content: 세일로 싸게 구매했네요 ㅎㅎ 택배 받자마자 비프랑 덕 중에서 뭘 더 좋아할까 싶어서 둘 다 줘봤는데 덕을 더 좋아하네요~ 맛도 맛이겠지만 비프가 좀 딱딱하고 덕이 부드러워서 그런지 덕을 더 쉽게 잘 먹더라고요! 양은 대형견이랑 중형견 아이들에게은 적을 것 같은데 소형견 아이들은 꽤 충분할 것 같다고 느꼈어요! 칩 하나가 크기가 작은 건 아니라서 조각조각 부셔서 줘야해가지고 소형견 기준으로 양이 적진 않았습니다! 아이가 너무 잘 먹어서 다음에는 덕만 구입할까봐요~
reviews.content_en: I got it on sale for cheap ㅎㅎ As soon as I received the package, I was curious which he'd like more between beef and duck, so I gave him both - and he likes duck more! The taste is good, but beef is a bit hard and duck is softer, so he eats the duck more easily! The quantity might be a bit little for large and medium-sized dogs, but I think it's quite enough for small dogs! Since each chip isn't tiny, I do have to break them into pieces, but by small dog standards, the quantity isn't too little! Since my pup eats it so well, I'm thinking of buying only duck next time~

reviews.name: 권****
reviews.content:
기호성 최고애요
15살 아이가 먹는데 여러번 재구매 ing중 입니다.
첫구매때 비프도 주문했었는데 잘먹어서 재구매했었는데
안먹;;;그래서 재주문 으로 오리를 구매~근데 잘먹었습니다.
비프도 기호성이 좋은데 최근으론 오리간식이 더 땡기나바요.
원형칩이고 바삭은 하나 막 딱딱한게 아니라서 15살 아이도
쉽게 잘먹었습니다
reviews.content_en: Best palatability ever! 💯 My 15-year-old pup is eating these and I keep reordering! I got beef on the first purchase and he ate it well, so I reordered. Then he wouldn't eat it;;; so I tried duck instead~and he loved it! Beef has great palatability too, but lately my pup seems more into the duck treats. They're circular chips that are crispy but not hard at all, so my 15-year-old eats them easily!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
오모나 오모나 진짜.. 이 및힌 기호성!!! 애들 넘 좋아해요ㅜㅜ
먹이기도 넘 편하구.. 너무 작은 간식은 한 번 주면 바로 와그작 하고 사라져버리는데 이건 적당한 크기라 나눠주면 와그작 와그작 열심히 먹어서 집사들 밥먹을 때 하나씩 주기 넘 좋았어요!!
앞으로도 애용할게요~~!!
reviews.content_en: Oh my goodness, oh my goodness, seriously... this incredible palatability!!! The pups absolutely love them ㅜㅜ Super easy to feed too.. tiny treats disappear in one bite with a quick crunch, but these are the perfect size so when I give them pieces, the pups munch munch munch enthusiastically. It's so great to give one to each pup when I'm eating my meal too!!~!!

reviews.name: 양****
reviews.content:
쉽게 바스러지지도 않고 그렇다고 너무 딱딱한것도 아니라 댕댕이들 먹기 좋은거같아요!
코인칩은 종류별로 먹여보는 중인데 다 기호성이 너무너뮤 좋네요!
작게 잘라서 노즈워크하기도 좋아영
reviews.content_en: They don't crumble easily, and they're not too hard either, so they seem really good for doggies to eat! I'm trying the COIN CHIP in different flavors and the palatability is seriously amazing! Easy to cut into small pieces for nose work too 😊

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
기호도는 말할 것도 없구요!
바삭한 제형이랑 홈 덕분에 잘 쪼개져서 좋았어요.
통째로 급여하기 부담스러운 분은 손으로 톡 쪼개서 주시면 됩니다.
주식을 중단백으로 주고 있는데 생육 함량이 높은 코인칩을 간식으로 주니 균형 잡기 좋고 안심되네요.
reviews.content_en: The palatability goes without saying! The crispy texture and the grooves make it easy to break apart, which is great. If you're hesitant about giving it whole, you can easily snap it with your hands. I give a medium-protein as the main diet, and it's reassuring and helps balance nutrition by giving the high raw meat content COIN CHIP as a treat.

reviews.name: J****
reviews.content:
맛있는 코인칩 냠냠🐾

귀여운 코인 모양으로 재료도 한번에 확인할수 있어 안심하고 급여할수 있고 기호성도 너무 좋아 바삭바삭 맛있게 잘먹어요! 이번에 애카에 가서 댕댕이 친구들과 나눠먹었는데 완전 인기만점👍🏻 다른 맛도 먹여보고 싶어요!
reviews.content_en:
Yummy COIN CHIP nom nom🐾

The cute coin shape lets you check the ingredients at a glance, so I can feed with confidence, and the palatability is so good that my pup eats them crispy and delicious! I went to puppy daycare this time and shared them with my pup's doggy friends - they were a total hit👍🏻 I want to try other flavors too!

reviews.name: 류****
reviews.content:
처음 구매해보는 간식인데 뭐든 다 잘먹는 아이라서 잘먹을거 같아요 ㅎㅎ 크기도 작아서 좋고 지퍼백이 있어서 보관하기
편리하네옹
reviews.content_en: First time buying these treats and my pup eats everything anyway so I'm sure she'll love them haha 😊 The size is nice and small, and it has a zipper bag so storage is convenient!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
코인칩 여러 종류 다 먹여봤는데
가리지않고 다 잘먹어서 또 구매했네요 
동그랗고 얇아서 주기도 편하고 아삭아삭 맛잇게 먹어요
reviews.content_en: I've tried several types of COIN CHIP and my pup eats them all without being picky, so I bought them again! They're round and thin so they're easy to give, and my pup eats them crunchy and tasty!

reviews.name: 비****
reviews.content:
코인칩에는 단백질과 칼슘이 들어있고 또 소화까지 챙길수 있다니 완전 짱!  

처음 먹어보는데 기호성도 너무 좋아서 요즘 최애 간식이 되버렸습니다^^,, 

먹을때마다 asmr 소리로 대리만족중이예요 ㅎㅎㅎ
듣고 싶어서 더 주게 되는 그런 간식 입니다!! 

다 급여하면 또 재구매할게요 >,<
reviews.content_en: COIN CHIP has protein and calcium, and you can take care of digestion too - totally awesome! It's my first time trying them and the palatability is so good that it's become my current favorite treat^^ I get vicarious satisfaction from the ASMR sound when eating haha This is the kind of treat that makes you give more because you want to hear that sound!! I'll reorder once we finish these >,<

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
바삭바삭 먹을 때 소리가 너무 좋아요!! 
소리가 듣고 싶어서 자꾸자꾸 주게되네요 🤣
잘라서(라기보단 부신다는게 더 어울리지만) 주기도 넘 편하고 기호성도 너무너무 좋아요
코인칩 꺼내는 부스럭 소리만 나면 자다가도 날아와요 👍🏻
reviews.content_en: The sound when eating is so crispy and satisfying!! I keep giving it to her because I want to hear that sound 🤣 Breaking them apart (rather than cutting) is super easy and the palatability is seriously amazing! The moment she hears the crinkle of the COIN CHIP bag, she flies over even from sleep 👍🏻

reviews.name: 권****
reviews.content: 15살 아이가 너무 잘 먹네요. 양은 다소 적은 양 같지만 다 먹으면 또 주문할 거 같아요. 비프라서 잘 먹는 거 같네요
reviews.content_en: My 15-year-old pup eats these so well. The quantity seems a bit small, but once we finish I'll definitely order again. I think she eats them well because they're beef flavored!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
냄새 무엇 ? 
무슨 육포같은 맛있는 냄새가 나요 😃
사람이 먹어도 될것같은 냄새 😅
크리스피해요 손으로 딱 잘 쪼개 지구요 ~ 
약간 비스킷 같으면서도 바삭한 육포 같으면서도 
이름을 넘 잘지은거 같아요 코인칩 딱 그 느낌이에요 
아작아작 잘 묵어서 다 먹고 다른맛도 먹여볼거에요 🤎
reviews.content_en: What's that smell? 😃 It smells like delicious beef jerky! It even smells like something a person could eat 😅 It's crispy and breaks apart so nicely in your hand~ It's kind of like a biscuit but also has that crispy jerky feel, and I think the name is just perfect for it - it's exactly like coin chips! My pup eats it up completely and I'm planning to try other flavors too 🤎

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 너무 잘 먹는 간식이에요~~가격이 비싼것만 빼면 너무 좋은 간식이에요~~~
reviews.content_en: It's a treat my pup absolutely loves~~ The only downside is the price, but otherwise it's such a great snack~~~

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content:
저번에 이거저거 담다가 사줬었는데 너무잘먹길래 또구매했어요 
  그땐 다부서져서 와서 밥에 뿌려줬었는데 이번엔 뽁뽁이에 싸서 와서 안부서지고 왔네여 🫠 역시 너무 잘먹어요
reviews.content_en: I got it last time as an impulse buy and my pup ate it so well that I bought it again. Last time it came all broken up so I sprinkled it on their food, but this time it came wrapped in bubble wrap so it didn't break 🫠 They still eat it so well!

reviews.name: 양****
reviews.content:
코인칩 잘 먹어서 다른걸로 구매해봤는데 처음에 엄청 냄새맡다가 잘 먹더라구요!
뼈튼튼이라길래 잘 뛰고 두발로 서서 도움되길 바라며 구매했어요!
엄청 잘먹어용
reviews.content_en: My pup eats the coin chips well, so I tried buying a different flavor. At first they sniffed it a lot, but then ate it right up! I bought it hoping it would help with strong bones since they love to jump and stand on their hind legs. They eat it so well!

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content: 비프 구매 했었는데 너무 잘 먹고 먹이기도 편해서 다른 맛도 구매 했어요 ! 조금씩 쪼개서 주거나 밥 안 먹을 때 사료 위에 잘게 부셔서 뿌려주면 잘 먹네용 ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: I bought the beef flavor before and my pup ate it so well and it was easy to feed, so I got other flavors too! I can break off pieces and give it to them, or crumble it finely on top of their food when they won't eat their regular kibble and they eat it great lol

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content: 전에 처음 사서 먹여봤었는데 다른것도 다 잘 먹지만 특히 고기를 좋아하는지라 아주 잘 먹어요 알러지 위험도 없으니 맘 편히 먹일 수 있어서 좋아요 ~
reviews.content_en: I tried it for the first time before and bought other flavors since my pup eats everything, but they especially love meat so they eat this very well. There's no allergy risk either so I can feed it with peace of mind~

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content:
오랜만에 간식을 사줬더니 너무 좋아하네요ㅜㅜㅎㅎㅎ
다이어트는 늘 숙제라 자주는 아니지만 행복해하니 좋아요^^
reviews.content_en: I bought a treat after a long time and my pup loves it so much ㅜㅜㅎㅎㅎ Diet is always a challenge so I don't give it often, but seeing how happy they are makes it worth it ^^

reviews.name: 나****
reviews.content: 소고기 원육 그대로에 딱딱하지도 않고 바삭바삭한게 너무 맛있게 먹어요ㅋㅋㅋ 양질의 단백질에 안전한 간식이라 건강도 챙기고 무엇보다 치아를 튼튼하게 한다니👀 다음엔 오리도 사봐야겠어요!!
reviews.content_en: Pure beef jerky that's not hard and crunchy in just the right way - they eat it so deliciously lol It's a quality protein with a safe treat, so I'm supporting their health, and on top of that it strengthens their teeth 👀 Next time I should try the duck flavor!!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
우선 기호성이 확실해요. 코인칩 들면 개인기 시키지도 않은거 막 하고 난리나요😂 몇번 먹어본 간식은 지겨워하기도 하는데 코인칩은 그런거 없어요 ㅎㅎ
고기 원물이 많이 들어간데다 방부제도 없어서 막 줘도 걱정이 없어요
당분간은 코인칩으로 건강한 간식주기 하려구요!!
reviews.content_en: First of all, they definitely like it. When I pull out the coin chips, my pup does tricks without even being asked and goes crazy 😂 Other treats they've had a few times they get bored of, but not the coin chips haha Since it has a lot of real meat and no preservatives, I can give it without worrying. For now I'm planning to give healthy treats with coin chips!!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 아주 잘먹어요~ 치아가 부러져서 최대한 안딱딱한걸로 사주려고 이번에 이것저것 구매했는데 딱딱하지않고 잘먹어서 좋아요~~
reviews.content_en: They eat it so well~ My pup's teeth were broken so I bought various treats this time trying to get ones that aren't too hard, and this one isn't hard and they eat it well so I'm happy~~

reviews.name: 권****
reviews.content:
아이가 좋아해요.잘먹어요.코인모양인데 딱딱하진않고
바삭한 식감정도 인거같아요.장거리 병원갈때만 주고있어요
reviews.content_en: My pup loves it and eats it so well! It's coin-shaped and not hard at all—it has a nice crispy texture. I only give it when we have to travel far to the vet.

reviews.name: 권****
reviews.content:
아이가 좋아해요.잘먹어요.코인모양인데 딱딱하진않고
바삭한 식감정도 인거같아요.장거리 병원갈때만 주고있어요
reviews.content_en: My pup loves it and eats it so well! It's coin-shaped and not hard at all—it has a nice crispy texture. I only give it when we have to travel far to the vet.

reviews.name: Z****
reviews.content: 친구 강아지한테 줄려고 샀는데 넘 잘 먹오요! 특히 코인칩이 넘 딱딱하지 않고 자르기 쉬워서 좋네요 :)
reviews.content_en: I bought this for a friend's dog and he absolutely loves it! The coin chips especially aren't too hard and they're easy to break apart, which is great :)

reviews.name: 손****
reviews.content:
부스팅코인칩은 처음 급여하는데 처음먹는거는 잘안먹는편인데 이건 주자마자 순삭했어요ㅋㅋㅋ
식감도 바삭바삭하고 딱딱하지 않아서 좋아요 !! 
무방부제라 믿고 먹이는 간식 !!
reviews.content_en: First time trying the Boosting Coin Chips and even though my pup is usually picky with new treats, he devoured this right away lol The texture is super crispy and not hard at all, which is perfect!! I trust giving it because it's preservative-free!!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 재구매에요 아기가 정말 잘먹어요! 코인칩으로 되어잇어서 주기에도 간편하고 들고다닐때도 편해요
reviews.content_en: It's a repurchase! My baby loves it so much! Since it comes in coin chip form, it's convenient to give and easy to carry around.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 꾸준히 구매하고잇어요 재료답게 소고기와 멸치냄새가 나거 강아지가 조아해요
reviews.content_en: I keep buying this regularly and true to the ingredients, it smells like beef and anchovy which my dog loves!

reviews.name: 엄****
reviews.content: 강아지가 잘 먹어서 다른걸로 구매해 봤어요 강아지가 씹을때마다 바삭바삭 소리가 넘 귀엽네요
reviews.content_en: My dog eats it so well that I decided to try other products too. The crunchy sound every time he chews is so cute!

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content:
너~무  잘 먹어요
가격대가 있어 고민했는데  바잇미  제품들이 다 좋아요.
냄새도 좋고 아껴 먹어야 겠어요.
근데  좀 많이 깨져서 왔어요.
reviews.content_en: He eats it SO well I was hesitant because of the price point, but all BITE ME products are great. The smell is good and I need to be more careful with portions. Though some pieces arrived broken.

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
하루 한개씩 주기에
너무딱이네요^^
딱딱이도 아니어서 걸릴걱정도없고요
reviews.content_en: Giving one a day is just perfect ^^ It's not hard so I don't have to worry about it getting stuck either.

reviews.name: 뭉****
reviews.content: 코인칩 너무 좋아해요 그래도 쟁이지않고 다먹이면 주문합니다 ㅋㅋ 산책 후 하나씩 먹어요
reviews.content_en: My pup absolutely loves the coin chips! As long as he doesn't get picky and eats them all, I'll keep ordering lol We have one after our walks.
